     The Numbers Business Report

Nobody (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,568,035Details
International Box Office $29,944,435
Worldwide Box Office $57,512,470
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,465,889
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,185,811
Total $9,651,700
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Sometimes, the man you don’t notice is the most dangerous of all. Hutch Mansell is an underestimated and overlooked dad and husband, taking life’s indignities on the chin and never pushing back. A nobody. When two thieves break into his suburban home one night, Hutch declines to defend himself or his family, hoping to prevent serious violence. His teenage son, Blake, is disappointed in him, and his wife, Becca, seems to pull only further away. The aftermath of the incident strikes a match to Hutch’s long-simmering rage, triggering dormant instincts and propelling him on a brutal path that will surface dark secrets and lethal skills. In a barrage of fists, gunfire and squealing tires, Hutch must save his family from a dangerous adversary — and ensure that he will never be underestimated as a nobody again.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,820,100 (24.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,460 opening theaters/2,567 max. theaters, 8.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,420,223

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 26th, 2021 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: March 19th, 2021 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
March 19th, 2021 (Wide) (Middle East Region)
March 19th, 2021 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
March 19th, 2021 (Wide) (Egypt)
April 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 16th, 2021 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and bloody images, language throughout and brief drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2636 (Cert #52773), 7/1/2020)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: Nobody
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, False Identity, Hitmen, Mid-Life Crisis, Money Troubles, Out of Retirement, Revenge, Russian Mafia
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 87North, Odenkirk-Provissiero, Eighty Two Films, Universal Pictures, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Sometimes, the man you don’t notice is the most dangerous of all. Hutch Mansell is an underestimated and overlooked dad and husband, taking life’s indignities on the chin and never pushing back. A nobody. When two thieves break into his suburban home one night, Hutch declines to defend himself or his family, hoping to prevent serious violence. His teenage son, Blake, is disappointed in him, and his wife, Becca, seems to pull only further away. The aftermath of the incident strikes a match to Hutch’s long-simmering rage, triggering dormant instincts and propelling him on a brutal path that will surface dark secrets and lethal skills. In a barrage of fists, gunfire and squealing tires, Hutch must save his family from a dangerous adversary — and ensure that he will never be underestimated as a nobody again.
